推荐场景: 服务窗口｜填写姓名、地址、电话
60秒任务: 「填写信息」：预约/排队/规则/手续；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 预约｜手续｜规则｜等待｜文件材料｜服务说明
场景族: 诊所前台｜银行/服务窗口｜邮局｜维修柜台｜咨询室
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I need to fill in this form.（说明任务）
Which part should I complete first?（询问顺序）
Do I write my full name here?（确认填写项）
Could you check this for me?（请求检查）
I made a mistake on this line.（说明错误）
Can I use a new form?（请求新表格）
Please write your address and phone number.（说明填写要求）
You need to sign at the bottom.（提示签名位置）
Is this information correct?（确认信息）
I don't know my reference number.（说明缺失信息）
Can I leave this part blank?（询问可否空着）
Let me update the address.（修改信息）
Please attach a copy of ___.（提示附件）
Once you finish, take it to window ___.（说明下一步）
Thanks, I’ll hand it in now.（完成提交）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: form, full name, address, phone number, email, signature, reference number
Verbs: fill in, complete, write, sign, check, attach
Adjectives / Adverbs: correct, missing, blank, clear
Time / Place: here, at the bottom, on this line, at window two
Chunks: fill in a form, sign at the bottom, leave it blank, attach a copy, hand it in
